steps.title: Identify the thesis statement
steps.content: The passage ends with its central claim: “Villasana sees both of these approaches as ways of depicting the power and interconnectedness of all people.” This statement reveals that she works with two distinct approaches—famous cultural figures and ordinary people—and both illustrate human strength and connection.

steps.title: Match the thesis to the choices
steps.content:
B directly states the central idea—recognizing both famous and everyday examples of human strength and connection.

The other choices either assume a career progression, make distinctions the passage doesn't support, or introduce outside information.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
